testcase.name: Successful Login with Valid Credentials

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for title to contain "Dashboard". Current title: "Just a moment...". (tried for 30 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\AutomationProfile}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52377}, goog:processID: 42072, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52377/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: a1a2f381cd163a013df3e22d6bfa78d7

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for title to contain "Dashboard". Current title: "Just a moment...". (tried for 30 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\AutomationProfile}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52377}, goog:processID: 42072, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52377/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: a1a2f381cd163a013df3e22d6bfa78d7 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:85) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:233) at stepDefinitions.LoginStepsusingPOM.page_title_should_be(LoginStepsusingPOM.java:134) at ✽.Page Title should be "Dashboard / nopCommerce administration"(file:///C:/Users/adhav/workspace_eclipse_new/nopCommereV001_CucumberProject5/src/test/resources/Features/LoginHybridDrivenMethod.feature:10)
testcase.system-out: Given User Launch Chrome browser............................................passed When User opens URL "https://admin-demo.nopcommerce.com/login?returnUrl=%2Fadmin%2F".passed And User enters Email as "admin@yourstore.com" and Password as "admin"......passed And Click on Login..........................................................passed Then Page Title should be "Dashboard / nopCommerce administration"..........failed When User click on Log out link.............................................skipped Then Page Title must be "nopCommerce demo store. Login".....................skipped And close browser...........................................................skipped
